leaves.title: Read the frozen authorities and trace the clean Gate 140 workflow
leaves.objective: Freeze the observed current-state handoff chain before any later seam planning proceeds.
leaves.workflow_intent_assertion: This leaf is a planning-mode workflow trace across Stages 4-7 only; it does not change runtime behavior.
ordered_actions: Read the governing authorities in the repo-native order.
Trace the current handoff chain from posture through review on the clean Gate 140 baseline.
Record the observed workflow anchor in the Gate 141 receipt document.
forbidden_actions: Do not invent new governed vocabulary in this leaf.
Do not edit runtime code in this leaf.
Do not treat discarded same-day drafts as authority.
expected_evidence: observed workflow anchor recorded from clean Gate 140 surfaces
definition_of_done: current workflow anchor is written without speculative future behavior
active vocabulary and packet/data authorities are named explicitly
leaves.packaging_requirement: Not required until Gate 149 closes the pack.

leaves.title: Create the new planning quartet from the repo-native template law
leaves.objective: Populate the new gates master, leaves ledger, execution log, and document-touch checklist from observed repo truth only.
leaves.workflow_intent_assertion: This leaf installs the mandatory active-pack scaffolding required before later execution gates can start.
ordered_actions: Write the new quartet with all mandatory sections and fields.
Keep later gates bounded and derived from observed workflow truth only.
forbidden_actions: Do not omit the vocabulary or packet/data authority sections.
expected_evidence: later gates 142-149 are routed with bounded objectives
definition_of_done: quartet exists and is internally coherent
leaves.packaging_requirement: Not required until Gate 149 closes the pack.

leaves.title: Route the repo truthfully to Gate 142
leaves.objective: Update the live router surfaces, changelog, and planning guards so Gate 141 closes honestly and Gate 142 becomes active.
leaves.workflow_intent_assertion: This leaf is the anti-drift closeout step required by repo process law.
ordered_actions: Route PLANS to the new pack.
Add Gate 141-149 rows to the canonical gate map.
Advance the active gate marker to Gate 142.
Update guard tests to admit the new active-pack state.
forbidden_actions: Do not leave PLANS in no-active-pack state.
Do not advance Gate 142 without updating the leaves ledger and execution log on the same branch.
expected_evidence: PLANS, gate map, leaves, and execution log all show Gate 141 complete and Gate 142 active
guard tests admit the new router state
definition_of_done: guard tests pass in repo-local environment
leaves.packaging_requirement: Not required until Gate 149 closes the pack.

leaves.title: Record the Gate 141 execution receipt in the active log
leaves.objective: Capture the branch, validations, and observed planning evidence so Gate 141 closes with receipts rather than chat memory.
leaves.workflow_intent_assertion: This leaf closes Gate 141 and leaves Gate 142 active with a receipt-bearing execution log.
inputs: observed git branch and validation results
ordered_actions: Record the exact Gate 141 branch name, start commit, validations, and closeout state in the execution log.
forbidden_actions: Do not leave the execution log receipt-empty after Gate 141 closes.
expected_evidence: Gate 141 receipt recorded live in execution log
definition_of_done: execution log status shows Gate 141 complete on main and Gate 142 next
leaves.packaging_requirement: Fresh full-history zip deferred until Gate 149.
